subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Satan is the base self, which provokes destruction and impetuosity. Outwardly some individuals are refined and presentable, but in their essence they remain base.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شیطان یکی نفس اماره است که ببغی و فحشا میکند و دیگری بعض نفوس بظاهر آراسته
subcodes.subjects: @Satan; the Evil One, @outward and inward meanings
